items.title: We spoke to over 30 central bankers, policymakers and politicians. Here are their top concerns
items.summary: From stagflation to energy security, policymakers spoke to CNBC about the biggest risks arising from the ongoing U.S.-Iran war.

items.title: Nvidia's once-tight bond with gamers is cracking over AI, 'and that breaks my heart'
items.summary: Gamers once helped save Nvidia from bankruptcy. Now they feel left behind as the memory crunch drives focus to AI chips and DLSS 5 disrupts game design.

items.title: No escape: U.S.-Iran war, $4 gas, have taken all the fun out of consumer spending
items.summary: Consumers are still spending amid U.S.-Iran war and $4 gas prices, but there's a pullback at entertainment and dining venues hitting local economies hard.

items.title: Gasoline could drop below $4 in coming days - NPR
items.summary: Gasoline costs should start to fall soon, although a full recovery to pre-war prices is expected to take months. That's assuming that peace holds and traffic flows resume through the Strait of Hormuz.
